auth.login.heroBody: Coordinate your priorities, knowledge, and decisions from one secure workspace built for focused execution.
auth.login.heroTitle: Your executive desk, ready when you are.
auth.login.point.privateBody: Keep conversations, documents, and operating context inside one protected environment.
auth.login.point.knowledgeBody: Bring notes, files, and background context together so your assistant responds with substance.
auth.login.point.controlBody: Adjust behavior, workflows, and access with a workspace designed around your operating style.
auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.subtitle: Continue to your workspace and pick up where you left off.
auth.login.errorFallback: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
auth.login.metadata.title: Sign In
auth.login.metadata.description: Sign in to your See-Sweet workspace and continue with your assistant.
auth.signUp.heroBody: Set up a workspace that helps you capture context, organize moving parts, and shape how your assistant operates.
auth.signUp.heroTitle: Build the workspace around how you work.
auth.signUp.point.fastBody: Open your workspace in minutes and begin shaping the assistant around your priorities.
auth.signUp.point.organizedBody: Keep meetings, notes, tasks, and documents aligned in one structured flow.
auth.signUp.point.controlBody: Define tone, instructions, and system behavior without losing clarity or oversight.
auth.signUp.title: Create account
auth.signUp.subtitle: Create your workspace and start configuring your assistant.
auth.signUp.passwordPlaceholder: Create a password with at least 8 characters
auth.signUp.errorFallback: Unable to create your account. Please try again.
auth.signUp.metadata.title: Create Account
auth.signUp.metadata.description: Create your See-Sweet workspace and start shaping your assistant.
landing.metadata.title: Private Executive Secretariat
landing.metadata.description: See-Sweet gives each user a private executive secretariat for meetings, decisions, priorities, and follow-through.
landing.badge: Built for founders, executives, and focused operators
landing.title: A private AI assistant that works like your executive office.
landing.subtitle: See-Sweet helps you prepare for meetings, hold context across time, track decisions, and move work forward with the discipline of a strong chief of staff.
landing.signal.private.title: Private by design
landing.signal.private.body: Keep your operating context, conversations, and knowledge inside an authenticated personal workspace.
landing.signal.prep.title: Preparation first
landing.signal.prep.body: Turn meetings, documents, and notes into briefs, talking points, and structured follow-up.
landing.signal.followThrough.title: Follow-through built in
landing.signal.followThrough.body: Capture actions, decisions, and commitments so important work does not disappear between sessions.
landing.panel.title: Executive support, structured for one user
landing.panel.subtitle: Start with a clear promise, then move into your workspace at /home after authentication.
landing.useCase.founder.title: Founder
landing.useCase.founder.body: Prepare for investor, hiring, and board conversations while keeping strategy and follow-ups connected.
landing.useCase.executive.title: Executive
landing.useCase.executive.body: Run a daily operating desk for briefings, stakeholder context, meeting preparation, and decision support.
landing.useCase.operator.title: Consultant or solo operator
landing.useCase.operator.body: Manage multiple workstreams without losing commitments, context, or momentum between sessions.
meetings.metadata.title: Meetings
meetings.metadata.description: Prepare, review, and follow through on your meetings inside a structured private workspace.
meetings.list.title: Meeting prep and follow-up
meetings.list.description: Track the meetings that matter, keep preparation visible, and carry decisions forward into the next session.
meetings.list.emptyBody: Create the first meeting to start building a durable record of objectives, preparation, and follow-through.
meetings.new.metadata.title: New Meeting
meetings.new.metadata.description: Create a new meeting record with objective, schedule, participants, and preparation notes.
meetings.new.title: Capture the next conversation before it happens.
meetings.new.description: Start with the essentials. You can add more structure and follow-up detail after the meeting.
meetings.edit.metadata.title: Edit Meeting
meetings.edit.metadata.description: Update the schedule, participants, and preparation details for this meeting.
meetings.edit.title: Refine the meeting record before and after the conversation.
meetings.edit.description: Adjust the essentials, sharpen the preparation, and keep the meeting record current.
meetings.form.objectivePlaceholder: What needs to be aligned, decided, or unlocked?
meetings.form.participantsHint: One person per line. Add role or context later if needed.
meetings.form.prepNotesPlaceholder: Context, talking points, known risks, or questions to resolve.
meetings.form.summaryPlaceholder: What happened, what was aligned, and what changed?
meetings.form.nextStepsPlaceholder: What should happen next after this meeting?
meetings.form.actionItemsPlaceholder:
Share updated board memo
Confirm budget assumptions
meetings.form.decisionsPlaceholder:
Approve revised roadmap
Delay vendor migration to Q3
meetings.form.errorFallback: Unable to create meeting. Please try again.
meetings.form.updateErrorFallback: Unable to update meeting. Please try again.
meetings.form.deleteErrorFallback: Unable to delete meeting. Please try again.
meetings.form.deleteConfirm: Delete this meeting? This cannot be undone.
meetings.detail.metadata.description: Review preparation, participants, outcomes, action items, and decisions for this meeting.
home.title: Your executive workspace
home.description: Start with the meeting workflow, keep decisions visible, and build continuity session by session.
home.focusBody: Meeting prep and follow-up is now the main workflow in the authenticated workspace.
home.emptyMeetings: No meetings yet. Create one to begin the Phase 1 workflow.
shell.footer.description: Private executive workspace for continuity, preparation, and follow-through.
legal.placeholder.description: This page is in place for the authenticated shell and legal navigation. Replace the placeholder content when the final policy text is ready.
legal.placeholder.note: The current version is intentionally short and exists to complete the protected navigation flow in Phase 2.
legal.privacyPolicy.metadata.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacyPolicy.metadata.description: Placeholder privacy policy page for the See-Sweet authenticated workspace.
legal.privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy placeholder
legal.privacyPolicy.body: Use this page for the final privacy policy that explains how user-scoped workspace data, meeting records, and authentication data are handled.
legal.termsOfUse.metadata.title: Terms Of Use
legal.termsOfUse.metadata.description: Placeholder terms of use page for the See-Sweet authenticated workspace.
legal.termsOfUse.title: Terms of use placeholder
legal.termsOfUse.body: Use this page for the final terms governing access to the private workspace, acceptable use, and account responsibilities.
legal.security.metadata.title: Security
legal.security.metadata.description: Placeholder security page for the See-Sweet authenticated workspace.
legal.security.title: Security placeholder
legal.security.body: Use this page for the final security statement covering authentication, data boundaries, infrastructure, and incident handling expectations.
